title: eupatorium angustilobum
intro: Eupatorium angustilobum, also known as White Snakeroot, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. Eupatorium angustilobum is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of White Snakeroot can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
